name_en: Kaburaya (Whistling Arrow), Sacred Treasure of Kabura Hachiman Shrine
description_en: A historical material (shrine treasure), a whistling arrow of Kaburahachiman Shrine. Municipally designated by Hanamaki City on 1994-08-18. Located in Towacho Tsuchizawa, Hanamaki City.

name_romaji: Matsuo Jinja sekihi (Nanbu Tōji no hi)

description_en: A historical material, a stone monument at Matsuo Shrine. Municipally designated by Hanamaki City on 2012-04-26. Located in Ishidoriyacho Kochi, Hanamaki City.
